name: SentinelX402
tagline: Detect malicious domains and IPs in under 300ms with 95% confidence
description: Free threat intelligence API for AI agents. Real-time phishing detection, CVE risk analysis, IP reputation. Powered by live feeds. 1,000 free requests, no signup required.
keywords: CVE risk intelligence for AI agents

tools.name: domain_risk_lookup
tools.description: Detect phishing and malicious domains in real-time. Returns risk score (0-100), threat type, confidence, and related suspicious domains.

tools.name: ip_reputation
tools.description: Check if an IP is a known C2 server, botnet node, or malicious host. Powered by Feodo Tracker live feed.

tools.name: threat_feed
tools.description: Get latest threat indicators (phishing domains, malicious IPs, malware hashes) with pagination.

tools.name: cve_risk_analysis
tools.description: CVE risk analysis with exploit probability, patch urgency, and ransomware risk. Goes beyond raw CVSS.

tools.name: recent_critical_cves
tools.description: Recent critical CVEs from the last 7 days with enhanced risk analysis.

tools.name: cve_search
tools.description: Search CVEs by keyword with exploit probability and patch urgency scoring.
